query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.projectId,
  p.amount,
  p.receivedAt,
  p.type,
  pr.dataOrigin,
  pr.totalAmount,
  pr.name
FROM payments p
LEFT JOIN projects pr ON p.projectId = pr.id
ORDER BY p.projectId, p.receivedAt;

ORDER BY p.projectId, p.receivedAt;
